work_item.description: cf_abandon MCP tool: expose a public server method that marks a work item as Abandoned through the event store, so tests and the conductor can drive items into Abandoned status through the public boundary without reaching into internal plumbing (cfk_engine::events::append_event / cfk_engine::store::event_export_dir). The tool should accept a work_item_id and return a confirmation. This unblocks the cf_status abandoned-count tests (work item a561c8a4) which currently have no public API to abandon items through.
